implemented: Platform module and entitlement gates for seo
M8 LocalBusiness and Service JSON-LD injected by default in generated sites
DataForSEO rank snapshot adapter with explicit unconfigured blocker behavior
On-page audit engine for generated site title, meta description, JSON-LD, and lead form wiring
Keyword-gap article brief generation parked as article ApprovalQueue artifacts
SEO queue route and Nexi tool
Monthly plain-English SEO report PDF generation
Nexi deterministic routing for rankSnapshot, auditSiteSeo, seoQueue, draftSeoArticleBrief, and seoReport

notes: Installed real local node_modules in the seo worktree.
npm warned that this desktop is Node v24.14.0 while the repo target is Node 20.x.
npm audit reported existing dependency noise: 29 vulnerabilities. No force fix was run.

targeted_tests.command: node --test apps/server/test/seo.test.mjs apps/server/test/sites-runtime.test.mjs apps/server/test/content-engine.test.mjs apps/server/test/platform.test.mjs apps/server/test/nexi-job-desk.test.mjs

full_tests.note: The printed tenancy failure is the planted fixture test proving the scanner catches an unscoped query.

blockers.exactBlocker: DATAFORSEO_LOGIN and DATAFORSEO_PASSWORD are not configured/available for staging in this worktree context.
blockers.safeBehavior: rankSnapshot returns configured=false with blocker text instead of fake ranks.

blockers.exactBlocker: Requires owner/browser screenshot against the staged M8 page after deployment.
blockers.safeBehavior: Local test proves JSON-LD is injected; live screenshot is not claimed.

blockers.exactBlocker: This receipt is local only. Staging deploy, /api/version SHA-match, and live Nexi wall must run before any M9 merge gate.

outboundBoundaries: SEO fixes are parked in ApprovalQueue with noExternalPublish=true.
Keyword-gap article briefs are parked as approval artifacts and do not publish.
